properties.name: skylark.authz.app-code
properties.description: Logical appCode used to fetch RBAC snapshot from permission.

properties.name: skylark.authz.token-path
properties.description: OAuth2 token endpoint path on permission service.

properties.name: skylark.authz.snapshot-path
properties.description: RBAC snapshot endpoint path on permission service.

properties.name: skylark.authz.sync-fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay (ms) between RBAC snapshot sync runs.

properties.name: skylark.authz.ignore-paths
properties.description: Ant patterns to bypass authz enforcement.

properties.name: skylark.authz.require-authentication
properties.description: If true, unauthenticated requests are rejected with 401.
